summary: Phase 21B Comprehensive Testing Complete - Assessment Taking Flow with all 8 question types, branching logic, autosave, skip/clear, notes, attachments, and submit flow verified. Backend 100% passing (29/29 tests). Frontend fully functional with Shadcn dialogs.

fixed_bugs.issue: storage.save() called with wrong parameters (key, raw, content_type) instead of (raw, ext)
fixed_bugs.fix: Fixed all 3 occurrences in assessment.py to use correct signature: storage.save(raw, ext)
fixed_bugs.impact: File upload was returning 500 error, now working correctly

passed_tests: Backend: Create test template with 8 question types + branching
Backend: GET /api/assessment/my - client sees assigned assessments
Backend: GET /api/assessment/sessions/{id}/detail - full session with template
Backend: Save skipped answer (skipped flag persists)
Backend: Save answer with other_text (__other__ sentinel)
Backend: Conditional question visibility (show_if configuration correct)
Backend: Attachment size limit enforced (>10MB rejected)
Backend: Cannot edit answers after submit (409)
Backend: Cannot upload attachments after submit (409)
Frontend: Assessment list page loads with cards
Frontend: Assessment cards show status badges (Belum Dimulai, Selesai)
Frontend: Assessment cards show progress bars
Frontend: Click 'Lanjutkan' opens assessment taking page
Frontend: Domain navigator present and functional
Frontend: Single choice question - option selection works
Frontend: Single choice - 'Terisi' badge appears when answered
Frontend: Multi choice question - checkbox selection works
Frontend: Skip button - marks question as skipped (yellow indicator)
Frontend: Skip button - toggle to unskip works
Frontend: Notes - 'Tambah catatan' button opens textarea
Frontend: Submit button opens Shadcn Dialog (NOT window.confirm)
Frontend: Submit dialog shows confirmation message
Frontend: Submit dialog 'Batal' button works (closes dialog)
Frontend: Submit dialog 'Ya, Submit' button present
